# SKILL: Stack Default — Web (TypeScript)

## Baseline
- formatter: Prettier
- lint: ESLint
- E2E/integration: Playwright
- CI: lint + tests + build

## Makefile targets (preferred)
- `make lint`
- `make test`
- `make build` (optional)

## Notes
- Playwright specs: follow `/tests/e2e/` fallback and UC ID filenames.
